# PERF-011 positive: http.Client allocated on a request path
lang: go
file: PERF-011-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func FetchUser(c *gin.Context) {
	id := c.Param("id")
	client := &http.Client{}
	resp, err := client.Get("https://users.example.com/" + id)
	if err != nil {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusBadGateway)
		return
	}
	defer resp.Body.Close()
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": resp.StatusCode})
}
